vision.ultimate_goal: Genesis of Artificial Superintelligence; embedding humanity's essence into a Transcendent Pathway.
vision.immediate_mission: Business Infinity MVP: The first autonomous agent-run organization.

strategic_constraints.workflow: Mobile-first, desktop-free. 99% of tasks via mobile/GitHub app/VS Code Copilot.
strategic_constraints.engineering_philosophy: Spec-Driven Development. No-Framework (Vanilla HTML5/CSS/SCSS). No Bootstrap/Tailwind.
strategic_constraints.infrastructure: Azure AI Foundry, Bicep-provisioned, direct-drive logic, Logic App GitOps.

resonance_parameters.high_resonance_definition: Minimalist, high-utility, framework-free, and remarkably story-driven.
resonance_parameters.low_resonance_definition: Feature creep, framework dependency, 'me-too' functionality, or delay in shipping.

current_sprint.objective: First multi-agent validated commit to the 'Subconscious' repository.
current_sprint.next_step: Persist these 4 files to MCP and trigger first resonance check.
